title: Memcached SASL Authentication Failure Detection
dataSources: Memcached stderr/log with SASL errors, or `stats` `auth_errors` when available, sourcetype `memcached:stats` / `memcached:log`
app: UF on memcached log path; extend stats poll to include `auth_errors`
spl:
index=infrastructure (sourcetype="memcached:stats" OR sourcetype="memcached:log")
| search auth_errors>0 OR "authentication failed" OR "SASL" AND ("fail" OR "error")
| eval ae=tonumber(auth_errors)
| bin _time span=15m
| stats sum(ae) as auth_errs count as log_hits by host, _time
| where auth_errs > 5 OR log_hits > 10
description: Repeated SASL failures may indicate credential rotation mistakes, offline LDAP, or brute-force attempts against cache endpoints exposed beyond trust zones.
value: Protects in-memory data stores that sometimes hold serialized sessions or PII from unauthorized access.
implementation: Enable SASL (`-S`) in controlled environments; forward logs with `chmod` restrictions. If only `auth_errors` counter exists, delta it like other counters. Correlate with firewall and VPC flow logs for client IPs.
